title: Tunisian Chicken Skewers with Roasted Tomato Salsa
description: Grilled Tunisian chicken skewers served with a fresh and flavorful roasted tomato salsa, perfect for a Mexican-inspired dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, salt, and pepper. Add the chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the chicken onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, roast the tomatoes in the oven at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until they are tender.
In a blender or food processor, combine the roasted tomatoes, red onion, jalapeño pepper, and cilantro. Blend until smooth.
Serve the grilled chicken skewers with the roasted tomato salsa spooned over the top.
